commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

Operator enacted both kill proposals from 2026-05-13: v21-early-exit-meanrev and v14-vel5-10-dd-shadow are absent from today's strategies.json (both action items -> EXECUTED). Active strategy count moved from 39 -> 41, reflecting the 2 kills plus ~4-5 new v24 shadow entries (serial_rugger+climbing, flow_imb<0+vwap, rapid_fire+recovery, busy_batch+climbing, bundle_suspect+climbing). v24 cohort is all LOW-N (<5 trades each) -- no evaluations yet.

## Headline

v21-bottom-excluded has cleared the 100/100 composite score -- all four SOL-bar gates pass. n=126, total=+4.232 SOL, drop_top3=+2.232 SOL, monthly=+44.26 SOL/mo. Edge-decay DECAYING (last-25 mean=-3.52%, wr=36%) but kill criterion not triggered (total_net_sol still strongly positive at +4.232). Yesterday: +0.517 SOL on 39 shadow trades.

## SOL Accumulation (Lifetime, Leave-One-Out)

Strong accumulators with robust drop_top3:
- v21-bottom-excluded (shadow, n=126): +4.232 SOL, drop3=+2.232, monthly=+44.26 -- 100/100 composite, PROPOSED for live promotion
- v9shadow-velmono-dev (shadow, n=27): +3.959 SOL, drop3=+2.338 -- best edge quality, STABLE
- v9shadow-vel20-top5 (shadow, n=45): +3.684 SOL, drop3=+0.634 -- STABLE
- v10-best-double (shadow, n=63): +2.336 SOL, drop3=+0.037 -- approaching n=100, DECAYING, drop3 razor-thin

Bleeders (yesterday):
- v14-snipers-liq: -0.818 SOL on 40 trades. Lifetime +0.256 SOL but drop3=-2.715 -- outlier-driven. DECAYING.
- v22-snipers-flow: -0.686 SOL lifetime, -0.685 yesterday. Consistent loser.

## Three DECAYING Flags

1. v21-bottom-excluded: recent-30 median=-23.9% vs all-time -0.95%. Last 25: mean=-3.52%, wr=36%. Yesterday's strong day (+0.517 SOL) provides partial counter-evidence.
2. v10-best-double: recent-30 median=-28.65% vs all-time -10.74%. Drop3=+0.037 -- if decay continues, crosses INVALID before n=100.
3. v14-snipers-liq: recent-30 median=-23.36% vs all-time -13.1%. Drop3=-2.715 at n=56. Edge entirely outlier-driven.

## Panel 7 & 11

v21-bottom-excluded: top5<10% ROBUST (Panel 7, deg=-0.23pp), max_dd>-10% ROBUST (1.65pp). Panel 11 vel<20+top5<10% STABLE (wr_std_dev=8.2%). Both walk-forward and regime checks pass.

v10-best-double: Panel 7 flags vel 20-50 as OVERFIT (deg=10.18pp) -- explains DECAYING.

## Operator Next Step

Primary: Approve or defer live promotion of v21-bottom-excluded (100/100 composite, Panel 11 STABLE, DECAYING caveat noted). Recommend 0.1 SOL trade size + 20-trade review. Secondary: review v14-snipers-liq for early kill (drop3=-2.715 SOL, outlier-dominated).

anomalies.detail: v21-bottom-excluded DECAYING -- recent-30 median -23.9% vs all-time -0.95%. Kill criterion not triggered (total_net_sol +4.232 SOL positive).
v10-best-double DECAYING -- recent-30 median -28.65%. Drop3=+0.037 SOL near-zero. Panel 7 vel 20-50 OVERFIT.
v14-snipers-liq DECAYING -- drop3=-2.715 SOL outlier-driven. Bled -0.818 SOL yesterday.

patterns: v14-snipers-liq bled -0.818 SOL on 40 trades in one day -- drop3=-2.715 SOL shows entire apparent edge is from 3 outlier trades.
vwap-pullback combos (v22-mono-vwap, v22-top5-vwap-strict) showing early positive daily results.
vel 20-50 based strategies all bled yesterday. Panel 7 confirms vel 20-50 OVERFIT.
v22-snipers-flow lost -0.685 SOL lifetime on 17 trades -- flow_imb>0.6 not working.

promote.reason: 100/100 composite -- n=126, drop_top3=+2.232 SOL, total=+4.232 SOL, monthly=+44.26 SOL/mo. Panel 11 STABLE (wr_std_dev=8.2%). Panel 7 core filters ROBUST. DECAYING flag noted but kill criterion not met. Recommend live at 0.1 SOL + 20-trade review.

kill.reason: n=56, drop3=-2.715 SOL outlier-driven, DECAYING, bled -0.818 SOL yesterday. Recommend early kill.
n=17, total=-0.686 SOL, drop3=-1.399 SOL. Consistent loser.

watch.reason: n=63, score=92.6, DECAYING, drop3=+0.037 razor-thin, vel 20-50 OVERFIT. Kill if drop3 crosses zero before n=100.
n=27, score=85.4, drop3=+2.338, monthly=+9.55. STABLE. Best edge quality roster.

action_items.summary: Promote v21-bottom-excluded to live -- 100/100 composite, all 4 gates pass, Panel 11 STABLE. DECAYING flag noted; recommend 0.1 SOL trade size + 20-trade review.
Kill v14-snipers-liq -- drop3=-2.715 SOL outlier-driven, DECAYING, bled -0.818 SOL yesterday.

commands.action_item_note: v21-early-exit-meanrev absent from strategies.json -- kill enacted by operator 2026-05-13 to 2026-05-14.
v14-vel5-10-dd-shadow absent from strategies.json -- kill enacted by operator 2026-05-13 to 2026-05-14.
